assertions.text: Identifies that both nodes use 'nodes-base.' prefix instead of 'n8n-nodes-base.'
assertions.passing_criteria: Response mentions missing 'n8n-' prefix or wrong nodeType format for at least one node

assertions.text: Identifies that chatId is a plain string instead of __rl object
assertions.passing_criteria: Response mentions __rl format or resource locator issue for chatId

assertions.text: Identifies Telegram Trigger has typeVersion 1.1 instead of 1.2
assertions.passing_criteria: Response mentions typeVersion mismatch or outdated version on the trigger
Response mentions wrong credential key name or case mismatch

assertions.text: Output has a clear errors vs warnings structure
assertions.passing_criteria: Response has distinct errors section and/or warnings section, not just a wall of text
